title: Architectural Design
acceptance_criteria: Data flow documented (WhatsApp -> Nanobot -> Middleware -> Coding Env)
description: Create detailed architectural design including: (1) System architecture diagram with all three layers (WhatsApp/Nanobot, Middleware, Coding Environment), (2) Component boundaries - what each component is responsible for, (3) Data flow - how messages/commands flow through the system, (4) API contracts - REST endpoints, WebSocket message formats, (5) Security boundaries - where authentication/authorization happens, (6) Error handling strategy - how errors propagate, (7) State management - sessions, file states, terminal states. Include diagrams (ASCII or Mermaid) and detailed specifications.
